name: GPT-1
training_approach: unsupervised pretraining on BooksCorpus + supervised finetuning
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> GPT-1
summary: GPT-1 demonstrated that generative pretraining on a large unlabeled text corpus followed by discriminative finetuning could achieve strong performance across diverse NLP tasks. It validated the decoder-only transformer as a powerful architecture for language understanding, establishing the paradigm that scaling this approach would yield increasingly capable models.
